title: Retries, Idempotency, Compensation, and Recovery · Goal Brief: Recovery Tests
summary: Harden a loop that calls unreliable external services. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops recovery tests increment in a fault-injected recovery harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Inject timeouts, partial failures, duplicates, and restarts into loop tests.
Define compensating actions when atomic rollback is unavailable.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
